revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fnote%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fnote%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> ==Usage== This template links to help:footnotes.
===Optional=== For the first letter to be in lower case, use: {{Para|lc|<var>y</var>}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, interwikis to Wikidata. -------------------------------------------------------------------->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fnote%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}}
==Usage== This template links to help:footnotes.
===Optional=== For the first letter to be in lower case, use: {{Para|lc|<var>y</var>}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Documentation assistance templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
